name: Creative
description: References, assets, drafts, productions, taste notes, and releases.
purpose: Organize creative references, drafts, assets, production decisions, releases, and reusable taste knowledge.
audience: Creators, designers, writers, musicians, filmmakers, photographers, and teams managing creative work.
beginner_description: Use this for references, drafts, production logs, assets, taste notes, release notes, and creative decisions.
agent_instructions: Save references and drafts as sources unless the user is preserving a final artifact or proof. Compile durable production knowledge as production logs, insights, or research notes. Link people, concepts, tools, and decisions when they recur across projects.

suggested_workflows.title: Save references
suggested_workflows.intent: Keep inspiration, source material, and examples connected to future work.
suggested_workflows.route: add references as sources, then suggest links to related concepts or productions
suggested_workflows.example: Save these references for the next shoot.

suggested_workflows.title: Log a production
suggested_workflows.intent: Turn a creative artifact into a durable production record with outcomes and lessons.
suggested_workflows.route: note with note_type production-log, then connect recurring people, tools, and ideas
suggested_workflows.example: Turn this draft into a production log.

examples: Save these references for the next shoot.
Turn this draft into a production log.
